data.body: Option 1 (defensive rotation) LANDED on main via Gerrit change 323 (MERGED), commit 44bafdb9e. LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1. A fingerprinted session now rotates off a session=None pointer; degrade-safe (no-id session) preserved. CLAUDE.md wording updated. Next: option 2 investigation (why a session wrote the pointer with no CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID).
